config.not_found: Config file not found, creating a new one at: {}
config.parse_error: Failed to parse config file: {}. Please check for syntax errors.
config.missing_keys: Your config file is missing some keys. The plugin will use default values for them.
config.missing_keys_hint: This won't affect functionality, but you may want to add them to your config.json:
config.regenerate_hint: You can also delete your config.json to generate a new one with all keys on next startup.
config.updated_missing_keys: Auto-inserted {} missing config key(s) while preserving existing comments and key order.
config.update_missing_keys_failed: Failed to auto-insert missing config keys. Please check config.json manually.
i18n.load_partial: Language files were not fully loaded, fallback to key strings.
landflight.feature_disabled: Land flight is disabled in config.
command.player_only: This command can only be used by a player.
command.status.sent: Sent the current land flight status.
gui.title: Land Flight
gui.content.disabled:
Status: disabled
Current land: none
Cost: {} money / {} seconds
Current balance: {}

You can enable standby now. Flight and charging will start automatically after you enter an eligible land.
gui.content.enabled.free:
Status: active
Current land: {}
Flight mode: free

Flight pauses automatically after you leave the land, and resumes when you enter again.
gui.content.waiting.free:
Status: standby
Current land: {}
Flight mode: free

Flight will start automatically once you enter an eligible land.
gui.content.ready.free:
Status: disabled
Current land: {}
Flight mode: free

You are already inside an eligible land and can enable it immediately.
gui.content.disabled.free:
Status: disabled
Current land: none
Flight mode: free

You can enable standby now. Flight will start automatically after you enter an eligible land.
flight.error.already_enabled: You already have land flight enabled.
flight.error.not_enabled: Land flight is not currently enabled for you.
flight.error.not_in_land: You are not inside an eligible land, or you are not a member of it.
flight.error.already_can_fly: You already have flight ability and do not need land flight.
flight.error.not_enough_money: Insufficient balance. This charge requires {} money.
flight.error.charge_failed: Failed to charge money. Please try again later.
flight.started: Flight enabled inside land "{}". The first charge of {} will happen in {} seconds.
flight.started.charged: Flight enabled inside land "{}". The first period cost of {} has been charged. Next charge in {} seconds.
flight.enabled_waiting: Land flight standby is enabled. Once you enter an eligible land, flight and charging will start automatically. Cost: {} every {} seconds.
flight.started.free: Free land flight enabled inside land "{}".
flight.enabled_waiting.free: Land flight standby is enabled. Once you enter an eligible land, free flight will start automatically.
flight.entered_land: You entered land "{}". Flight has been restored automatically. Next charge in {} seconds.
flight.entered_land.charged: You entered land "{}". Flight has been restored automatically and {} money was charged for this period. Next charge in {} seconds.
flight.entered_land.free: You entered land "{}". Free flight has been restored automatically.
flight.charge.success: Charged {} money for this period. Next charge in {} seconds. Current balance: {}.
flight.stop.reason.manual: Land flight has been turned off manually.
flight.stop.reason.left_land: You left the eligible land. Flight has been turned off automatically.
flight.pause.reason.left_land: You left the eligible land. Flight is now paused and no money is being charged.
flight.stop.reason.not_enough_money: Insufficient balance. Land flight has been turned off automatically.
flight.stop.reason.charge_failed: Charging failed. Land flight has been turned off automatically.
flight.stop.reason.plugin_disabled: Land flight service has been disabled. Your flight state was cleared.
flight.status.enabled: Status: enabled. Current land: {}. Next charge in {} seconds. Cost: {} every {} seconds.
flight.status.waiting: Status: standby enabled. Flight and charging will start or resume automatically once you enter an eligible land. No charge is active now. Cost: {} every {} seconds.
flight.status.ready: Status: disabled. You can use it inside land "{}". Cost: {} every {} seconds.
flight.status.disabled: Status: disabled. You are not inside an eligible land. Cost: {} every {} seconds.
flight.status.enabled.free: Status: enabled. Current land: {}. Free flight mode is active.
flight.status.waiting.free: Status: standby enabled. Flight will start automatically once you enter an eligible land. Free flight mode is active.
flight.status.ready.free: Status: disabled. You can use it inside land "{}". Free flight mode is active.
flight.status.disabled.free: Status: disabled. You are not inside an eligible land. Free flight mode is active.
